content.en:
Boundary River No. 23.

Ye Tian and the Snow Maiden came here, and then shuttled to an eternal realm, the Heavy Mountain Realm.

"Little junior brother, the temporary base of the Futian Sect is in the Chongshan Realm. It seems that they moved here when you killed the Tai Blood Master, and now that the news has just been discovered, they should not have had time to evacuate. "

Snow Maiden said.

"Fourth Senior Sister, let's go in!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Hmm!"

The Snow Maiden and Ye Tian entered the Heavy Mountain Realm together.

This realm does not restrict the entry of the Eternal Master, and it has long been transformed by the Restoration Heaven Sect.

Therefore, Ye Tian and the Snow Maiden were not subject to any restrictions, and they easily entered this eternal realm.

As soon as he entered the Heavy Mountain Realm, Ye Tian immediately used his copying talent to envelop the entire Heavy Mountain Realm.

With his current strength, it was naturally not difficult for the scope covered by the copying talent to envelop the entire Eternal Realm.

In an instant, he locked on to the eternal masters of the Heavy Mountain Realm.

"Found it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And the strength of the Snow Maiden is much stronger than Ye Tiandu, although she did not copy the talent, she also quickly locked the position of the members of the Futian Sect.

......

"Oh no, it's been discovered!"

The members of the Futian Sect reacted one by one, and their expressions suddenly changed drastically.

And the sect leader and the two deputy sect masters of the Futian Sect were also panicked, it stands to reason that this place is very hidden, how could it be discovered?

It can only be said that the Snow Maiden's means are too powerful, when the Snow Maiden freezes the Haihe River controller, the incarnations of the Haihe River controller will all collapse, and the Futian Sect thinks that the Haihe River controller has been killed at most.

The Futian Sect knows about this, but it will only investigate whose hands the master of the Haihe River died, and will not immediately evacuate this base!

After all, in their opinion, this place will not be exposed!

But they never imagined that there would be someone who would be able to extract the memories of the Haihe Master, the Seven Realms-level Master, and lock the location of their base.

Moreover, it was so fast that it didn't take much time at all.

So, they didn't have time to withdraw.

At this moment, not all the members of the Futian Sect are here, but many high-ranking people are here.

Once this place is destroyed, the Restoration Sect is not far from being destroyed.

In a flash.

The Sect Leader and Deputy Sect Leader of the Futian Sect sensed the existence of the Snow Maiden and immediately became extremely desperate.

"Snow Maiden Master!

The Sect Leader of the Futian Sect shuddered.

He is only a master of the Eight Realms, although he has a statue of Ten Thousand Phases, but even if he fuses the Ten Thousand Phases Statue, he can't beat the Snow Maiden controller.

"Maybe I can still escape, but I can't care about the others!"

The Sect Master of the Restoration Heaven Sect immediately fused with the Ten Thousand Phases Statue.

Rumble!!!!

The aura of an infinitely close to the Nine Realms level master erupted from the body of the Sect Master of the Futian Sect.

Immediately, he was about to break out of the heavy mountain realm as fast as he could.

"Ruler of Quanshan, where are you going?"

The Snow Maiden's voice reached the ears of the Sect Leader of the Restoration Heaven Sect.

The next moment, a white jade hand came across time and space.

"Snow Girl, give me a way to live!"

The Restoration Sect Master shouted.

I saw countless black lights erupt from his body, and these black lights formed a dense enchantment, but under the slap of the Snow Maiden's white jade hand, they shattered one after another.

And the body of the controller of Quanshan also cracked inch by inch and flew upside down.

"Yes, your statue of Ten Thousand Phases focuses on defense, and it can withstand my blow. However, I just hit it casually. Snow Maiden said.

The controller of Quanshan panicked, he was really afraid.

He didn't want to die, he also wanted to become a Nine Realm-level master, a ten-realm-level master, and even a great existence like the Primordial Ancestor and the Ten Elements Ancestor.

However, he had no backer.

If you have a backer, you won't be able to practice the Heaven Snatching Technique.

Rumble!!!!

Another blow from the Snow Maiden struck.

This time, the Snow Maiden was serious.

She directly used the top-notch Origin Control Technique, the Void Ice Spear!

Burst!

The body of the master of Quanshan was directly pierced by the Void Ice Spear, and his body was constantly annihilated by the ice, if it weren't for the statue of Ten Thousand Phases, he would have been killed in an instant.

But even so, under the blow of the Void Ice Spear, he was almost dying.

"Frozen!"

The controller of Quanshan was also frozen and could not resist at all.

On the other side, Ye Tian prevented the other masters of the Futian Sect from leaving.

At this time, the Snow Maiden resolved the battle, and in an instant, all the members of the Futian Sect were frozen, and even the two Seven Realm-level controllers were instantly frozen.

In an instant, the frozen crystals shattered, and all these eternal masters turned into powder, and their lives fell on the spot.

After killing these members of the Restoration Heaven Sect, the treasures on their bodies, as well as the things in this temporary base, were all found by Snow Maiden and Ye Tian.

The next step is to distribute the treasures!

"The statue of Wanxiang is of little use to me, give it to you. "

The Snow Maiden directly gave the statue of Wanxiang to Ye Tian.

"Thank you, Senior Sister. "

Ye Tian was very pleased, this treasure helped him a lot!

Seeing that Ye Tian was so excited, the Snow Girl said: "One statue of ten thousand phases is just one, if you gather nine different statues of ten thousand phases, it will be of great use, and one statue of ten thousand phases is not too helpful to the Eight Realms-level controllers, and it has no amplification effect on the Nine Realms-level controllers." "

"Fourth Senior Sister, why is it so useful to gather nine statues of ten thousand phases?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Snow Maiden explained: "You don't know the origin of the Ten Thousand Phases Statue, it is not the Black Ancestor's thing, but it comes from a mysterious place, once you gather nine different Ten Thousand Phases Statues, you can form an incomparably terrifying secret art." For example, your Black Immortal Senior Brother, he has gathered nine Ten Thousand Phases Statues, and at the Ten Realms-level Controller level, he can increase his strength by one percent. However, only Senior Brother Black Decay has made it up, and no one else has made it up. Of course, the Black Ancestor also made it up at the beginning, but it was still suppressed by the Primordial Ancestor, and the treasures on his body were also taken away. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

It seems that the Snow Maiden has little interest in collecting the nine statues of ten thousand phases, so she doesn't care.

And this treasure fell into Ye Tian's hands and became his second statue of Wanxiang.

Subsequently.

The Snow Maiden took several treasures, but she didn't tell Ye Tian, but their value should not be low, and they should be helpful to the Snow Maiden, otherwise the Snow Maiden would not have taken them.

After that, the Snow Maiden took some more things and did not choose any more treasures.

"I'll give you the rest!"

Snow Maiden said.

"Thank you, Fourth Senior Sister!"

Ye Tian thanks.

Immediately, he took all the remaining treasures, and his heart was extremely excited, because this harvest was too great.

"By the way, there are some fish that have slipped through the net and are not here, so you need to kill them yourself. If you really can't find it, you will publish the list, and naturally someone will look for them. Don't think about completely exterminating the Heaven Conquering Technique, if you can't exterminate it, even if the master makes a move, you can't completely exterminate the Heaven Conquering Technique, this secret technique has spread too much, and even some Ten Realm-level controllers have the inheritance of the Heaven Conquering Technique in their hands, but they don't have cultivation. "

Snow Girl reminded.

"Fourth Senior Sister, I understand!"

Ye Tianying said.
